2605.17932.title: Prompt Compression in Diffusion Large Language Models: Evaluating LLMLingua-2 on LLaDA
2605.17932.paper_summary: Prompt compression reduces inference cost and context length in large language models, but prior evaluations focus primarily on autoregressive architectures. This study investigates whether prompt compression transfers effectively to diffusion large language models (DLLMs) using LLMLingua-2, specifically the 8B-parameter DLLM LLaDA. We evaluate compression performance on GSM8K, DUC2004, and ShareGPT using 250 prompts per dataset at an approximate 2$\times$ compression ratio, across mathematical reasoning, prompt reconstruction, and summarization tasks. Outputs generated from original prompts, compressed prompts, reconstructed prompts, and reconstructed-prompt reasoning were compared using exact-match accuracy, BLEU, ROUGE, and BERTScore. Results show that semantic preservation does not necessarily imply stable downstream behavior in diffusion models. Summarization tasks remained comparatively robust under compression, while mathematical reasoning degraded substantially despite high semantic similarity scores. Reconstruction experiments further showed that semantically similar prompts may still omit reasoning-critical information required for stable denoising. Across tasks, BERTScore recall was consistently lower than precision, suggesting that compression failures are primarily driven by information omission rather than semantic drift. These findings indicate that prompt compression methods designed for autoregressive models do not transfer uniformly to diffusion large language models and motivate the development of diffusion-aware compression strategies.
2605.17932.paper_summary_zh: 提示壓縮減少了大型語言模型的推理成本和上下文長度，但之前的評估主要集中在自回歸架構上。本研究探討提示壓縮是否能有效轉移到擴散大型語言模型（DLLMs），使用 LLMLingua-2，特別是 8B 參數的 DLLM LLaDA。我們在 GSM8K、DUC2004 和 ShareGPT 上評估壓縮性能，使用每個數據集 250 個提示，約 2$\times$ 的壓縮比，涵蓋數學推理、提示重建和摘要任務。從原始提示、壓縮提示、重建提示和重建提示推理生成的輸出，使用精確匹配準確度、BLEU、ROUGE 和 BERTScore 進行比較。結果顯示，語義保留並不一定意味著擴散模型中的下游行為穩定。摘要任務在壓縮下仍然相對穩健，而數學推理則顯著退化，儘管語義相似度得分很高。重建實驗進一步顯示，語義相似的提示仍可能省略穩定去噪所需的關鍵推理信息。在各個任務中，BERTScore 的召回率始終低於精確率，這表明壓縮失敗主要是由於信息省略而非語義漂移驅動。這些發現表明，為自回歸模型設計的提示壓縮方法並不會均勻地轉移到擴散大型語言模型，並激勵開發擴散感知的壓縮策略。
2605.17932.author: Sterling Huang et.al.
2605.17932.authors: Sterling Huang, Abigayle Brown, Jiyoo Noh, Jiakang Xu, Wantong Huo, Kaung Myat Kyaw, Jonathan Chan
